hero.badge: Developed from day-to-day hotel operations · Structured · Ready to use
hero.title: Operational Clarity for High-End Hospitality
hero.subtitle: Documented standards, clear procedures, and practical tools developed from how hotel teams work in practice. Designed to be used immediately, across departments.

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.text: Most hotels, regardless of category, face the same core issues: standards that shift with staff changes, processes that exist only in people's heads, and the ongoing pressure of turnover. LuxOps gives teams the structure and documentation to work consistently, regardless of who's on shift.
problem.point1_text: When standards aren't written down, guest experience depends on who's working. Consistency starts with documentation.
problem.point2_text: When a team member leaves, they take their knowledge with them. Documented processes protect what's been built, and make onboarding faster.
problem.point3_text: Without structured guides, every new hire starts from scratch. Clear documentation cuts integration time and reduces errors from day one.

solution.title: The LuxOps Approach
solution.text: We take operational knowledge built from years of running hotel departments and structure it into practical tools your teams can use daily, at every stage of the guest experience.

offers.title: Our Offerings
offers.digital_desc: Playbooks and Notion templates your team can start using the same day. No setup required.
offers.audit_desc: An in-depth quality audit and process design built around how your property works in practice.
offers.training_desc: Hands-on training run on your property, with your team. Half-day and full-day formats available.

social_proof.title: Methods developed through day-to-day hotel operations
social_proof.subtitle: Testimonials coming soon.

cta_section.title: Looking to strengthen your operations?
cta_section.text: Whether you need a practical tool or a structured review of your operations, we can help.

playbooks_page.title: Operational Playbooks
playbooks_page.subtitle: Documented SOPs built from how hotel departments work in practice. Each playbook is available in your preferred language.
playbooks_page.coming_soon_text: HR, Planning, Admin modules in development.
playbooks_page.playbook1_desc: Check-in/out procedures, guest communication protocols, upselling techniques, night audit, PMS systems and concierge standards.
playbooks_page.playbook2_desc: Room inspection checklists, linen management, turndown service protocols, and deep cleaning procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook3_desc: Restaurant service standards, bar operations, room service protocols, and banquet service procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook4_desc: Treatment protocols, therapist standards, booking management, and wellness programme structure.

notion_page.title: Notion Templates
notion_page.subtitle: Operational management workspaces structured for how hotel teams work in practice.
notion_page.base_desc: A complete Notion workspace covering the daily management of hotel operations. Dashboards, checklists, task tracking, and reporting structures across all key departments.
notion_page.custom_desc: Full customisation of the workspace to reflect your property's structure, brand standards, and the way your teams work in practice.

audit_page.title: Quality Audit
audit_page.subtitle: A 2-day operational audit to identify where operations break down and build a prioritised improvement plan.
audit_page.step1_desc: Review of existing documentation, current standards, and how the property works in practice.
audit_page.step2_desc: 2-day review across all departments. 100+ evaluation criteria.
audit_page.step3_desc: Detailed findings, gap analysis, and priority recommendations.
audit_page.step4_desc: 40-60 page report with a structured improvement roadmap.
audit_page.cta_subtitle: Have a property in mind? Tell us about it and we'll discuss what makes sense.

process_page.title: Custom Process Creation
process_page.subtitle: Complete process creation for any hotel department, built around your brand standards and how your teams work in practice.
process_page.desc: We write complete SOPs for any hotel department, formatted for print or Notion. We can work from your existing documentation or build new processes entirely from scratch.
process_page.cta_title: Ready to document your operations properly?

training_page.title: On-Property Training
training_page.subtitle: Operational training run on your property, built around your team and service context.
training_page.cta_title: Looking to train your team on property?

about_page.title: About LuxOps
about_page.subtitle: Operational methods built in demanding hotel environments, now available to other properties.
about_page.story_p1: LuxOps was built from years of hands-on experience running operations across high-end properties and independent hotel groups.
about_page.story_p2: Managing multi-department hotel operations day-to-day meant building structured procedures and SOPs out of necessity, in environments where a drop in service quality isn't an option.
about_page.story_p3: The logic was simple: most hotels face the same operational challenges, yet many still rebuild everything from scratch. LuxOps packages tested, structured methods so teams can implement them quickly and focus on what matters most: their guests.
about_page.v1_desc: We hold ourselves to the standards expected in the most demanding properties.
about_page.v2_desc: Complex operations become manageable when they're documented clearly and kept up to date.
about_page.v3_desc: Every recommendation is actionable, rooted in real operational experience.
